programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Página Inacabada - T01E46
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy fazem uma pausa. Quando a perseguição recomeça, Kakashi explica a Chiyo que Naruto também é um jinchuriki. Chiyo lamenta ter sido ela que selou o shukaku dentro de Gaara... Gaara é engolfado por uma luz branca. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Infiltração: O Covil Da Cobra! - T01E47
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy chegam ao esconderijo dos akatsuki, mas são parados por uma barreira de cinco selos. Neji usa seu byakugan para localizar os selos e os ninjas destroem a barreira. Naruto tem uma visão chocante. A equipe Guy encara uma armadilha. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Laços - T01E48
programme.desc: 2008. Quebrar a barreira de cinco selos ativa uma armadilha, e a equipe Guy enfrenta cópias idênticas de si mesmos. Deidara e Sasori lutam para se apoderar do jinchuriki. Forçado a seguir Naruto, Kakashi pede que vovó Chiyo e Sakura não façam nada precipitado. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Algo Importante... - T01E49
programme.desc: 2008. A luta entre avó e neto começa. Para derrotar o verdadeiro Sasori dentro do boneco, Hiruko deve ser destruído primeiro. Só a própria avó consegue entender as armadilhas complexas de Sasori, mas é Sakura que deve dar o golpe final. Que estratégia usarão? programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A História Do Álbum Ilustrado - T01E50
programme.desc: 2008. Chiyo e Sakura expõem Sasori, que não envelheceu nada nos últimos vinte anos. Chiyo fica mais chocada com o segundo boneco que Sasori revela. Sasori foi quem planejou o desaparecimento do kazecage. Uma equipe ninja se dirige a um certo local. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Reencontro - T01E51
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura fica cercada por uma nuvem de veneno e usa um papel bomba para se livrar da fumaça. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Poder De Uchiha - T01E52
programme.desc: 2008. Os bonecos criados de humanos podem comandar o jutsu que o humano usava enquanto vivo. Assim, o boneco do terceiro kazekage converte chakras em poderes magnéticos. Chiyo e Sakura se protegem, Sasori faz um ataque implacável. Sakura toma uma decisão. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Título - T01E53
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura revida o ataque da areia de ferro. Ela rapidamente começa a ler os padrões de ataque do Sasori, que se prepara para usar seu chakra. O ataque da areia de ferro penetra o espaço, Sakura é atingida na mão e é infectada pelo veneno! programme.desc: 2008. Sakura destrói o boneco do terceiro kazekage graças a um antídoto que ela tomou e que funciona durante cerca de três minutos. Chiyo e Sakura decidem derrotar Sasori nesse prazo. Sasori usa seu último trunfo. Naruto e Kakashi planejam capturar Deidara. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Vento - T02E55

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contorção - T02E56

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Despertar Do Sono Eterno - T02E57

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Solidão - T02E58
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura corre para achar Naruto com Vovó Chiyo, sofrendo envenenada. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Novo Inimigo - T02E59
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde o controle e o espírito da Raposa de Nove Caudas assume o comando. Kakashi consegue suprimir a Raposa de Nove Caudas. Deidara descobre a derrota de Sasori. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Impermanência - T02E60
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo realiza o jutsu de ressuscitação em Gaara. Gaara acorda cercado por Naruto e os outros e também por uma multidão de ninjas da areia. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contato - T02E61
programme.desc: 2008. Gaara e seus salvadores retornam à Aldeia de Areia. Após visitar o túmulo de Vovó Chiyo, Naruto e os ninjas da Folha têm que partir. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Companheiro De Equipe! - T02E62
programme.desc: 2008. Kakashi é hospitalizado devido à tensão causada por seu mangekyo sharinga. Apesar dos apelos de Shizune para enviar outra equipe, Tsunade afirma que enviará a equipe Kakashi para fazer o trabalho. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Os Dois Reis - T02E63
programme.desc: 2008. Sai diz que ele e Naruto se encontrarão de novo e desaparece. Homura e Koharu dizem a Tsunade que Naruto não deve ser enviado em missões envolvendo a Akatsuki. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Sinal De Fogo Preto - T02E64
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto fica enfurecido ao saber que Sai o atacou para testá-lo. Tsunade, Jiraiya, Yamatoe e Shizune se reunem no quarto de Kakashi. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Presa Na Escuridão - T02E65
programme.desc: 2008. A nova equipe Kakashi segue em direção à ponte Tenchi. Quando Sai mostra seu desprezo por Sasuke, o antagonismo com Naruto aumenta. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Almas Ressuscitadas - T02E66
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura vê Sai trabalhando em uma pintura abstrata e encontra um livro de desenhos incomum no meio das coisas dele. Enquanto vão em direção à ponte Tenchi, eles se mantêm atentos contra qualquer emboscada. Yamato orienta sua equipe caso uma luta aconteça. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden - T02E67
programme.desc: 2008. Yamato faz uma simulação para avaliar as habilidades e técnicas de luta da equipe Kakashi. Sai abandona Naruto para concluir a missão simulada. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Momento De Despertar - T02E68
programme.desc: 2008. O dia para capturar o espião finalmente chega. Yamato assume a aparência de Sasori e espera que o espião apareça. Para a surpresa de todos, o espião era Kabuto. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Desespero - T02E69
programme.desc: 2008. Ao enfrentar Orochimaru, Naruto liberta o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Quando Yamato vê a quarta cauda, lembra do que Jiraiya falou. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Ressonância - T02E70
programme.desc: 2008. Quando a terceira cauda aparece, Naruto só consegue ver Orochimaru. Ele está cego até para seus companheiros de equipe. Sakura é atingida e cai inconsciente. Sai finalmente segue para sua missão secreta. Naruto libera a quarta cauda proibida. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Meu Amigo - T02E71
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde a consciência e é tomado por impulsos destrutivos. Os clones de Sai e Yamato testemunham uma batalha horrível entre Orochimaru e Naruto. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Uma Ameaça Se Aproxima - T02E72
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto, mesmo transformado, não desiste de trazer Sasuke para casa. Sakura é ferida por Naruto, mas consegue usar seu ninjutsu para conter a agitação da Raposa de Nove Caudas. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Invasão Da Akatsuki - T02E73
programme.desc: 2008. Orochimaru aceita levar Sai para o esconderijo. Yamato consegue parar a agitação de Naruto, mas os ferimentos de Naruto são graves. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Sob O Céu Estrelado - T02E74
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto e sakura ficam chocados quando descobrem que Danzo planeja trabalhar com Orochimaru. A equipe Dakashi é forçada a fazer uma pausa. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Oração Do Velho Monge - T02E75
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto fica chocado ao saber que foi o responsável pelos ferimentos de Sakura. Yamato diz que ele irá suprimir o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas com seu ninjutsu. Sakura pergunta sobre uma história estranha que ela viu no livro de desenhos de Sai. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Próximo Passo - T02E76
programme.desc: 2008. Sai estremece quando encontra Sasuke no esconderijo de Orochimaru. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Escalada De Prata - T02E77
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi consegue achar Sai. Eles começam a interrogá-lo sobre os planos de Danzo, e Sai conta tudo. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Julgamento - T02E78
programme.desc: 2008. Kabuto faz um ataque de surpresa na equipe Kakashi para levar Sai de volta. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Un Grito Interrompido - T02E79
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto procura por Sasuke. Sai lembra que teve um irmão mais velho e consegue terminar o retrato inacabado. Antes de desaparecer após um ataque de Orochimaru, Sai promete que salvará Sasuke. Yamato descobre uma verdade entre os pertences de Sai. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Últimas Palavras - T02E80
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi fica chocada ao saber que a missão verdadeira de Sai é matar Sasuke. Sai alcança Sasuke - deve matá-lo ou salvá-lo? Sai e Sasuke se enfrentam, demolindo uma parte do esconderijo. Naruto e os outros encontram Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Notícias Tristes - T02E81
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi tem seu desejo atendido ao reencontrar Sasuke, mas Sasuke não mudou. Seu objetivo é se vingar de seu irmão mais velho, Itachi. Os impulsos da Raposa de Nove Caudas incitam Naruto, mas Sasuke usa seu sharingan para suprimir a raposa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Equipe Dez - T02E82
programme.desc: 2008. O desejo de Sasuke por vingança continua firme. Naruto fica chateado quando percebe que fracassou mais uma vez em levar Sasuke para casa. Orochimaru tem mais ou menos seis meses até sua transferência. A equipe Kakashi faz uma nova promessa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Alvo Na Mira! - T02E83

programme.title: 2023. A missão para resgatar Kaiba continua com uma ajudinha de... Mai? Mas será que Yugi e seus amigos se adaptarão a um mundo virtual em que as regras e estratégias mudam a toda hora? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E44

programme.title: 2023. Yugi e seus amigos resgatam Kaiba, mas ainda estão presos no jogo! A única saída requer enfrentar o Dragão de Cinco Cabeças, mas Joey, Mokuba e Mai perdem todos os seus pontos de vida no difícil duelo! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E45

programme.title: 2023. Um novo aluno, Duke Devlin, derrota Joey em um jogo de Duel Monsters, forçando Joey a ser seu servo. Duke força Joey a usar um uniforme de cachorro e o humilha em público, forçando Yugi a desafiar Duke para um duelo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E46

programme.title: 2023. Em troca da liberdade de Joey, Yugi concorda em desistir de Duel Monsters para sempre se ele perder. Sem conhecer bem as regras, Yugi começa mal. As chances dele não melhoram, e Duke revela que criou Monstros dos Dados-Masmorra com a ajuda de Pegasus! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E47

programme.title: 2023. Yugi usa suas habilidades de jogo natas para virar a mesa contra Duke, mas Duke menciona mais uma regra: todas as criaturas ocupam território no tabuleiro-grade. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E48

programme.title: 2023. Depois que o todo-poderoso Orgoth, o Implacável de Duke deixa toda a esquadra de monstros de Yugi em pedaços, Yugi só tem mais um turno antes de perder todos os seus pontos de vida! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E49

programme.title: 2023. Um cartomante arcano rouba o Enigma do Milênio, e Yugi precisa defendê-lo em um duelo para recuperá-lo! No entanto, não se trata de um simples advinho. Ele é um inimigo familiar e formidável do Reino dos Duelistas. Ou talvez não? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E01

programme.title: 2023. A misteriosa ameaça que controla Bandit Keith estilhaça o Enigma do Milênio antes de atear fogo na arena de duelos! Será que Yugi consegue remontar o Enigma do Milênio e salvar o espírito antes que tudo seja engolido pelas chamas? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E02

programme.title: 2023. A origem de Duel Monsters é revelada! Usando a mágica do Colar do Milênio, a historiadora egípcia Ishizu Ishtar mostra a Kaiba como Duel Monsters era jogado milênios atrás! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E03

programme.title: 2023. O espírito do Enigma do Milênio percebe que suas memórias do Egito antigo se esvaíram, mas Téa o ajudará a descobrir os mistérios de seu passado! programme.title: 2009. As notícias sobre a existência de um atacante de chamas mandam Raimon para Okinawa, esperando que seja Gouenji Shuuya. Mas que coisas inesperadas podem acontecer ao longo do caminho. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A grande batalha no mar do sul

programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E48

programme.title: 2009. O tsunami revela a Raimon que ele se juntou ao clube de futebol da escola e eles querem brincar com eles. Raimon vai para o Oumihara Junior High, e o jogo começa. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E50

programme.title: 2009. O Epsilon se tornou o Epsilon Remastered e desafia Raimon para a batalha. Mas não são apenas eles que estão nivelados, Raimon também. Mas eles ainda não conseguem romper as técnicas de Desarm, nem mesmo Fubuki. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: 2009. A partida entre Raimon e Epsilon Remastered continua sua segunda metade. Embora eles tentem o seu melhor, Desarm é muito rápido e poderoso para eles. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E52

programme.title: 2009. O retorno de Gouenji, juntamente com a vitória contra o Epsilon Remastered, elevaram o espírito de Raimon. Eles decidem voltar para casa para descansar. Mas assim que eles voltam, Diamond Dust quer que Raimon os enfrente em um jogo. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A escuridão congelante da poeira de diamante

programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E54

programme.title: 2009. O técnico Hitomiko decide remover Endou como goleiro e pede que ele se torne um libero. Depois disso, Aphrodi se tornará um atacante e Tachimukai se tornará o novo goleiro de Raimon. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: At bingo night, Wanda steps in after the regular bingo caller takes a tumble; shes a hit with everyone except Emma who takes drastic steps to restore her winning streak.

programme.title: Law and Order
programme.desc: The detectives suspect a 10-year-old girl is responsible for the death of a boy at a construction site.

programme.title: The Mauritanian
programme.desc: A defense attorney, her associate and a military prosecutor uncover a far-reaching conspiracy while investigating the case of a suspected 9/11 terrorist imprisoned at Guantánamo Bay, Cuba, for six years. Starring Jodie Foster, Tahar Rahim, Shailene Woodley.

programme.title: Spirit in the Blood
programme.desc: After a young girl is found dead in a secluded religious mountain community, a pack of teenage girls decide to fight against the evil spirits they believe killed her by embracing their own dark nature. Starring Summer H. Howell, Sarah-Maxine Racicot, Michael Wittenborn.

programme.title: A.rtificial I.mmortality
programme.desc: Exploring the latest thinking and technological advancements in AI.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him. Starring Joaquin Phoenix, Lady Gaga, Brendan Gleeson.

programme.title: I Am Johnny Cash
programme.desc: The life, music and artistic expression of Johnnys music, from his first hit in 1957 to 2002s Hurt.

programme.title: Nelly Knows Mysteries: A Fatal Engagement
programme.desc: When Dahlias boyfriend is found dead, advice columnist Nelly joins Detective Hogan to help find the killer. However, as suspicions creep in, Dahlia becomes the prime suspect. Starring Pascale Hutton, Kavan Smith, Sarah Grey.

programme.title: Made for TV With Boman Martinez-Reid
programme.desc: Boman is joined by Reality TV star Francesca Farago as he dates seven strangers with the hopes of finding one person to love him forever.

programme.title: Sharknado
programme.desc: A monstrous storm devastates Los Angeles, leaving the streets flooded and infested with sharks. Starring Tara Reid, Ian Ziering, John Heard.

programme.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
programme.desc: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple. Starring Ian Ziering, Tara Reid, Vivica A. Fox.

programme.title: Sharknado 3: Oh Hell No!
programme.desc: When Sharknadoes threaten the East Coast, chainsawwielding hero Fin must risk his life to save his children on spring break. Starring Ian Ziering, Tara Reid, Cassandra Scerbo.

programme.title: Sharknado 4 - The 4th Awakens
programme.desc: Five years after the wave of sharknados that wracked the east coast, the heroes are living a quiet life in the middle of the country. But there is no escaping... Starring Ian Ziering, Tara Reid, David Hasselhoff.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: As war with the Transformers rages on, inventor Cade Yeager forms an unlikely alliance with Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the planet. Starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Josh Duhamel.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee the Autobot finds refuge in a junkyard in a small California beach town. When 17-year-old Charlie revives him, she quickly learns that this is no ordinary yellow Volkswagen. Starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena, Jorge Lendeborg.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots take on their biggest challenge yet. When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, they must team up with a powerful faction of Transformers known as the Maximals to save Earth. Starring Anthony Ramos, Dominique Fishback, Peter Cullen.

programme.title: RuPauls Drag Race
programme.desc: RuPaul throws a spectacular curveball at the queens with the third design challenge of the season; legendary supermodel Iman guest judges.

programme.title: Project Runway Canada
programme.desc: In a high-stakes pairs challenge, the designers create bold looks using only Cashmere bathroom tissue, with one designer from each duo safe.

programme.title: Queer
programme.desc: Lee, a solitary American in Mexico City, falls for a beautiful, elusive former soldier. Journeying together into the jungle, Lee sees, for the first time, the possibility of an intimate and infinite love. Starring Daniel Craig, Drew Starkey, Lesley Manville.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: A man moves into a new home that has supernatural forces lurking in the shadows. As dark entities start to threaten him, his brave dog comes to the rescue. Starring Larry Fessenden, Shane Jensen, Arielle Friedman.

programme.title: Born Hungry
programme.desc: Following the story of a runaway child from the streets of India who is adopted by a family and becomes one of the top chefs in the world.

programme.title: Seven Veils
programme.desc: An earnest theater director is given the task of producing her former mentors most famous work, the opera "Salome," but disturbing memories from her past color her present. Starring Amanda Seyfried, Rebecca Liddiard, Douglas Smith.

programme.title: Riddled With Deceit: A Marthas Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: Former Detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr. Zee Madeiras to track down their friends missing emerald brooch, a thief and a murderer. Starring Jesse Metcalfe, Sarah Lind, Eric Keenleyside.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Real Murders
programme.desc: Master sleuth Aurora Teagarden (Candace Cameron Bure) must find a copycat killer who targets members of a crime-buff club. Starring Candace Cameron Bure, Lexa Doig, Robin Dunne.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: The Julius House
programme.desc: Aurora Teagarden finds her dream home, unaware of its strange history. Just as shes ready to move in, she discovers that its previous owners disappeared without a trace. Starring Candace Cameron Bure, Stephanie Bennett, Peter Benson.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: After moving to New York City, kung fu prodigy Li Fong enters a karate competition -- but his skills alone arent enough. With help from Mr. Han and Daniel LaRusso, he soon learns to merge two styles into one for the ultimate martial arts showdown. Starring Jackie Chan, Ralph Macchio, Ben Wang.

programme.title: A Haunting in Venice
programme.desc: Now retired and living in self-imposed exile in the worlds most glamorous city, Poirot reluctantly attends a seance at a decaying, haunted palazzo. He soon gets thrust into a sinister world of shadows and secrets when one of the guests is murdered. Starring Kenneth Branagh, Tina Fey, Camille Cottin.

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: The golden retriever helps his young owner (Kevin Zegers) and his coed soccer team to shine while outsmarting a wily dogcatcher. Starring Kevin Zegers, Dale Midkiff, Caitlin Wachs.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Dolphin Bay
programme.desc: A group of friends are spending the summer working as interns at a research center, which is researching unnatural changes in the local reef. After strange events begin to occur, the friends suspect a local legend may be tied to the reefs problems. Starring Izabela Rose, Jayden McGinlay, Ella Proberts.

programme.title: Stop Making Sense
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jonathan Demme captures Talking Heads and an ecstatic ensemble of musicians at their exhilarating best in this iconic live performance.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: When humanity allies with a bounty hunter in pursuit of Optimus Prime, the Autobots turn to a mechanic and his family for help. Starring Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci, Li Bingbing.

programme.title: Blink Twice
programme.desc: When tech billionaire Slater King meets Frida, he invites her to join him and his friends for a dream vacation on his private island. However, when strange things start to happen, shell have to uncover the truth if she hopes to make it out alive. Starring Naomi Ackie, Channing Tatum, Christian Slater.

programme.title: I Dont Understand You
programme.desc: Dom and Cole set out on the perfect Italian getaway. But after getting lost on the way to dinner, they end up stranded in a storm, offend the locals and-whoops-accidentally kill a beloved restaurant owner. Starring Andrew Rannells, Nick Kroll, Amanda Seyfried.

programme.title: A Real Pain
programme.desc: Mismatched cousins David and Benji tour Poland to honor their grandmother. Their adventure becomes complicated as old tensions resurface while exploring their family history. Starring Jesse Eisenberg, Kieran Culkin, Will Sharpe.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: After the sudden death of their father, four children face cruel treatment from their ruthless grandmother (Ellen Burstyn). Starring Heather Graham, Ellen Burstyn, Kiernan Shipka.

programme.title: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When a hotel manager is wrongly accused of killing the soon-to-be new owners son, she must use her hospitality skills to prove her innocence. Starring Karen Cliche, Samantha Walkes, Morgan Kelly.

programme.title: Metal Tornado
programme.desc: A research teams experiments with solar energy accidentally create massive magnetic vortexes that destroy everything in their path. Starring Greg Evigan, Lou Diamond Phillips, Nicole de Boer.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible. Starring Zachary Levi, Zooey Deschanel, Lil Rel Howery.

programme.title: Brian and Charles
programme.desc: Brian is a lonely and unlucky inventor who takes on his most ambitious project yet -- an artificial intelligence robot made from odds and ends, including an old washing machine. Starring David Earl, Chris Hayward, Louise Brealey.

programme.title: Gunda
programme.desc: Filmmaker Victor Kossakovsky captures natural images of cows, chickens, and a pig and its litter.

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: When Ms (Judi Dench) past comes back to haunt her, James Bond (Daniel Craig) must track down and destroy the threat to her and MI6, no matter how personal the cost. Starring Daniel Craig, Judi Dench, Javier Bardem.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Reclusive author Loretta Sage goes on tour to promote her new adventure novel with handsome cover model Alan. When Loretta gets kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire whos looking for a lost treasure, Alan tries to become a real hero and rescue her. Starring Sandra Bullock, Channing Tatum, Daniel Radcliffe.

programme.title: GoldenEye
programme.desc: A secret weapons theft sends Agent 007 to Russia, where a pretty computer programmer helps him track an ex-cohort believed dead. Starring Pierce Brosnan, Sean Bean, Izabella Scorupco.

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) and female agent Wai Lin (Michelle Yeoh) pursue a megalomaniacal tycoon (Jonathan Pryce) trying to start World War III. Starring Pierce Brosnan, Jonathan Pryce, Michelle Yeoh.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A new student gets welcomed into the top of the social food chain by an elite group of popular girls called the Plastics. However, when she makes the misstep of falling for the queen bees ex-boyfriend, she finds herself caught in their crosshairs. Starring Angourie Rice, Renee Rapp, Aulii Cravalho.

programme.title: Kiss of the Spider Woman
programme.desc: A political prisoner named Valentín shares a cell with a man named Molina. They form an unlikely bond as Molina recounts a Hollywood musical plot. Starring Diego Luna, Tonatiuh Elizarraraz, Jennifer Lopez.

programme.desc: Charlie Heller is a brilliant CIA decoder whose world comes crashing down when his wife dies in a London terrorist attack. programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - My Best Piggys Wedding
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) attempts to win Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) back when he hears she is planning to elope.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Love, Death and Basketball
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) consoles Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) when she returns from her honeymoon without the groom.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Touched by a Pig
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) comforts a grieving Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson); Cedrics Grandma Puddin (Cedric The Entertainer) turns a beloved pet into soul food.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - African-American Pie
programme.desc: Steve makes scandalous deathbed confessions to Cedric and Regina when he thinks he is having a heart attack.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - He Heard, She Heard
programme.desc: Michael looks to teach Claire a lesson after she sneaks out of the house and uses Kady as an accomplice.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Michaels Garden
programme.desc: Janet convinces Michael to have a procedure during a physical examination.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - The Power of Resilience
programme.desc: Learning how the way one rises from challenges is what defines them.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Incredible Bulk
programme.desc: Bernie starts buying everything in bulk, including junk food; Wanda locks up the junk food in a shed.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Maid Man
programme.desc: Bernie urges the new maid (guest star Theresa Saldana) to treat the children as if they were her own.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn whats behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQs Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Theres No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Its more than just where were from.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Whole Chicken and Fennel
programme.desc: Chef Don goes toe to toe with Chef Al; todays challenge focuses on the components of whole chicken paired with fennel; the pitmasters must artfully integrate Flo wine into their dish.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Sausage and Tomato
programme.desc: Chef Jazzuri and Chef Stanzee throw down in the semifinal match; sausage and tomato are on the menu today, but the contestants must also integrate blackberry Merlot jam into their dishes.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Pork Belly and Rice
programme.desc: The first round of the finals has arrived; Chef Stanzee faces off against Chef Al; the challenge is cooking up pork belly with a side of rice.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Vegan BBQ and Mango
programme.desc: Stanzee and Al look to seal their win and leave it all out in the arena; vegan BBQ with a side of mango is on the menu.

programme.title: In the Meantime
programme.desc: Soon to be married, a bride (Kali Hawk) finds that her friendship with a fellow volunteer (Darrin Dewitt Henson) at an adult-literacy program is developing into something much more intense.

programme.title: From This Day Forward
programme.desc: Patrice (Essence Atkins) and Corrine (Vanessa Simmons), two sexy and confident women in great relationships, have to learn tough lessons about trust and fidelity to make their love last.

programme.title: Family Time - Every Cloud Has A Silver Lining
programme.desc: Tony believes Rachel and Lori are trying to make a pass at him; Lisa thinks her new Spanish tutor is trying to teach her more than the language of love.

programme.title: Family Time - Girls Getaway
programme.desc: Lisa gets more than she bargained for when planning a trip for her and her sisters; Tony gets some bad work advice.

programme.title: Family Time - Merry Kwanzaa
programme.desc: When Lisas attempts to spread the holiday cheer fall short, Tony steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Family Time - Sick Of This
programme.desc: The Stallworths realize they are each a lot to handle when feeling under the weather.

programme.title: Family Time - There Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Anthony, a construction worker, wins $500,000 in the lottery, enabling him to move his family to a middle-class neighborhood.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The King and I
programme.desc: Bernie tries to show the children who is the king of the castle after he realizes everything he says to them goes through Vanessa first.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Jordan goes out for football in hopes of winning a trophy for the Bernie Mac Hall of Fame awards shelf; former Oakland Raiders running back Marcus Allen, MVP of Super Bowl XVIII stars.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Handle Your Business
programme.desc: Bernies weeklong stint on a local radio show leaves his family upset when he uses his private life to get laughs.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Back in the Day
programme.desc: When heartburn sends him to the emergency room, Bernie resolves to beat his age by acting like he did in his youth.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Mac 101
programme.desc: Bernie becomes a stern taskmaster after witnessing the childrens behavior at dinner, cracking down on Vanessa for her grades and making Bryana speak Spanish all the time.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Party of Five
programme.desc: Steve signs up gorgeous twins (Rosey and Renee Tenison) to replace Cedric and Lovita as his roommates.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Hes Gotta Have It
programme.desc: Steve and Regina clash when they share an office; Cedric loses his sex drive after a computer program predicts that his and Lovitas child will be ugly.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Little Stevie Blunder
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) woos a beautiful woman (guest star Kellita Smith) by pretending to be blind; Lovita (Terri J. Vaughn) discovers Cedrics (Cedric The Entertainer) secret locked box.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Roomies

programme.title: Married to the Mob (1988)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (Matthew Modine) gets close to a gangsters widow (Michelle Pfeiffer) in order to nab a crime boss (Dean Stockwell).

programme.title: She Rides Shotgun (2025)
programme.desc: Marked for death by unrelenting enemies, a newly released ex-con must protect his estranged 11-year-old daughter from a corrupt sheriff and a brutal gang leader wholl stop at nothing to protect his criminal interests.

programme.title: American Classic
programme.desc: Star Richard Bean suffers a public meltdown and returns to his hometown theater where he first discovered his brilliance; hes shocked to find the once-respected theater, now run by his brother Jon and ex Kristen, has become a dinner theater.

programme.title: American Classic
programme.desc: Richard begs Alvy for a Broadway return while tensions with Kristen escalate; Miranda struggles between acting and Penn; Kristen faces a shady developer; Richard produces his mothers funeral, making a shocking announcement.

programme.title: Unseen (2023)
programme.desc: Sam, a gas station clerk, receives a random call from Emily, a nearly blind woman whos running from her murderous ex in the woods. Using a phone, Sam becomes Emilys only chance for survival as she guides the terrified woman through a video call.

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers (1956)
programme.desc: A couple (Kevin McCarthy, Dana Wynter) discover that plant-life pods from space are replacing ordinary citizens.

programme.title: Like Water for Chocolate (1992)
programme.desc: The youngest daughter (Lumi Cavazos) of a Mexican family expresses her feelings in preparing wonderful food, when tradition keeps her from marrying her true love (Marco Leonardi).

programme.title: The Count of Monte-Cristo (2024)
programme.desc: Edmond Dantès is arrested for a crime he did not commit. After 14 years in prison, he manages a daring escape. Now rich beyond his dreams, he assumes the identity of the Count of Monte Cristo and exacts his revenge on the three men who betrayed him.

programme.title: Nickel Boys (2024)
programme.desc: Elwood Curtis college dreams are shattered when hes sentenced to a brutal reformatory in the Jim Crow South. Clinging to his optimistic worldview, Elwood strikes up a friendship with a fellow Black teen who dispenses fundamental tips for survival.

programme.title: Hustle and Flow (2005)
programme.desc: A pimp (Terrence Howard) in Memphis, Tenn., sees rap music as the way to escape his dead-end existence and achieve something meaningful.

programme.title: The Good Liar (2019)
programme.desc: Career con artist Roy Courtnay walks a treacherous tightrope as he hatches a scheme to swindle a well-to-do widow.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs (2024)
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he cant recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn theyre being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin (2005)
programme.desc: When his world spirals out of control, a drug dealer wants to leave his violent life behind and pursue his dream of becoming a rap artist. He channels the same manic intensity to his writing as he does to dealing.

programme.title: Hard Home (2024)
programme.desc: After the shocking murder of her daughter, a woman turns her high-tech home into a trap for the killer, initiating a deadly game of cat and mouse where every move can be fatal.

programme.title: Due Justice (2023)
programme.desc: Consumed by grief and driven by revenge, a former Marine embarks on a relentless mission to hunt down those responsible for the brutal murders of his beloved wife and daughter.

programme.title: Major League (1989)
programme.desc: Lackluster baseball players (Tom Berenger, Charlie Sheen, Corbin Bernsen) hear their Cleveland teams new owner is counting on them to lose.

programme.title: After Innocence (2005)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jessica Sanders interviews seven men who were wrongfully imprisoned until DNA testing set them free.

programme.title: The Foreigner (2017)
programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: The Firm (1993)
programme.desc: A law-school grad uncovers a sinister secret about the Tennessee firm that made him an offer he couldnt refuse.

programme.title: Seaside (2018)
programme.desc: A woman decides to run away to the Oregon coast with her boyfriend when he inherits a family beach house.

programme.title: The Ledge (2022)
programme.desc: A rock-climbing adventure turns into a living nightmare when a woman captures the murder of her best friend on camera. With nowhere to go, she begins a treacherous ascent up a mountain cliff as the killer and his friends follow close behind.

programme.title: Outlaw Posse (2024)
programme.desc: In 1908 an outlaw returns from years of hiding in Mexico to claim stolen gold hidden in the hills of Montana.

programme.title: The Foreigner (2017)
programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill (2014)
programme.desc: A dying Secret Service agent (Kevin Costner) who wants to reconnect with his estranged daughter (Hailee Steinfeld) is offered a potentially lifesaving drug in exchange for completing one final mission.

programme.title: I See You (2019)
programme.desc: Strange occurrences plague a small-town detective and his family as he investigates the disappearance of a boy.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: The Last Manhunt (2022)
programme.desc: In 1909 Willie Boy and his love, Carlota, go on the run after he accidentally shoots her father in a confrontation gone terribly wrong. With President Taft coming to the area, the local sheriff leads two Native American trackers to hunt them down.

programme.title: Wander (2020)
programme.desc: Hired to investigate a suspicious death in the town of Wander, a paranoid private eye with a troubled past becomes convinced the case is linked to the same conspiracy and cover-up that caused the death of his daughter.

programme.title: Shadow Land (2024)
programme.desc: Haunted by dreams of an assassination plot, a former American president uncovers a conspiracy to discredit his legacy. With help from his trusted adviser, they embark on a dangerous mission that could expose a global crisis.

programme.title: The Time Machine (2002)
programme.desc: A scientist (Guy Pearce) travels into the future and meets a race of people who fear hideous monsters living under the ground.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Shaft (2000)
programme.desc: A detective (Samuel L. Jackson) and a narcotics cop (Vanessa L. Williams) track a sociopath out to kill a woman who can testify that he committed murder.

programme.title: Witness (1985)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old Amish boy witnesses a drug-related murder in a Philadelphia train station. The Philadelphia police captain discovers that the murderers are cops trying to squelch a corruption investigation.

programme.title: Downhill Racer (1969)
programme.desc: A cocky American skis and après-skis Europe, training with his coach for the Olympics.

programme.title: Top Gun (1986)
programme.desc: For Lieutenant Pete "Maverick" Mitchell and his friend and co-pilot Nick "Goose" Bradshaw, being accepted into an elite training school for fighter pilots is a dream come true. But a tragedy will threaten Petes dreams of becoming an ace pilot.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Good Kill (2014)
programme.desc: An Air Force drone pilot (Ethan Hawke) begins to question the ethics of dropping bombs on Afghanistan from the safety of his post in Las Vegas.

programme.title: 68 Kill (2017)
programme.desc: A hardworking mans inability to say no to a beautiful women gets him in trouble when he agrees to steal $68,000.

programme.title: Maniac (2012)
programme.desc: A serial killer (Elijah Wood) removes his victims scalps and attaches them to the vintage mannequins he restores in his late mothers shop.

programme.title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives (1986)
programme.sub-title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives (1986)
programme.desc: Teenage Tommy (Thom Mathews) meets masked-killer Jason, brought back by a lightning bolt at the lake.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier (1989)
programme.sub-title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier (1989)
programme.desc: A renegade Vulcan makes Kirk (William Shatner), Spock (Leonard Nimoy), McCoy (DeForest Kelley) and the Enterprise go to a planet at the center of the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis (2002)
programme.desc: The crew (Jonathan Frakes, Brent Spiner) of the Enterprise must prevent a replica of Capt. Picard (Patrick Stewart) from overtaking Earth.

programme.title: Man With No Past (2025)
programme.desc: Waking up in an unfamiliar city, a man with no memory must confront the mysteries of his own identity. However, his desperate search to uncover the past pits him against a powerful enemy, leading to a showdown that ultimately reveals the truth.

programme.title: Twisted (2004)
programme.desc: With help from her partner (Andy Garcia), a police inspector (Ashley Judd) searches for a killer who is murdering her former lovers.

programme.title: The Lookout (2007)
programme.desc: A brain-damaged former athlete (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) finds himself pulled into a heist at the bank where he works as a janitor.

programme.title: The Score (2001)
programme.desc: A master thief (Robert De Niro) agrees to work with a volatile partner (Edward Norton) for one last heist before he retires.

programme.title: Mothers Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mothers Day draws near, a single mom (Jennifer Aniston) learns that her ex-husband (Timothy Olyphant) is marrying a younger woman (Shay Mitchell), while a recently widowed man (Jason Sudeikis) struggles to raise his two daughters.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias (1989)
programme.desc: Based on the play about six Southern women who become close friends despite their eccentricities and complicated lives.

programme.title: Confessions of a Dangerous Mind (2002)
programme.desc: Chuck Barris produces game shows for television and leads a double life as a CIA assassin.

programme.title: Like Water for Chocolate (1992)
programme.desc: The youngest daughter (Lumi Cavazos) of a Mexican family expresses her feelings in preparing wonderful food, when tradition keeps her from marrying her true love (Marco Leonardi).

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: Morning Glory (2010)
programme.desc: Disaster follows a producers (Rachel McAdams) decision to bring in a legendary TV anchor (Harrison Ford) to revitalize a struggling morning-news program.

programme.title: Forces of Nature (1999)
programme.desc: A bridegroom (Ben Affleck) hurries by plane to his wedding, but he and his seatmate (Sandra Bullock) must find other modes of travel.

programme.title: Funny Face (1957)
programme.desc: A fashion photographer (Fred Astaire) turns a Greenwich Village bookworm (Audrey Hepburn) into a Paris cover girl.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffanys (1961)
programme.desc: New York playgirl Holly Golightly (Audrey Hepburn) puzzles a writer (George Peppard) who lives in her building.

programme.title: Sabrina (1995)
programme.desc: Sons (Harrison Ford, Greg Kinnear) of a Long Island tycoon become romantic rivals for the chauffeurs daughter (Julia Ormond).

programme.title: Bounce (2000)
programme.desc: An ad executive (Ben Affleck) seeks out the widow (Gwyneth Paltrow) of a stranger who swapped tickets with him before boarding an ill-fated flight.

programme.title: Emma (1996)
programme.desc: Things keep getting worse after a young matchmaker (Gwyneth Paltrow) finds a mate for a simple young woman (Toni Collette) in rural 1800s England.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Spencer (2021)
programme.desc: The marriage between Princess Diana and Prince Charles has grown cold. Though rumors of affairs and a divorce abound, peace is ordained for the Christmas festivities at the queens estate. However, this year, things will be profoundly different.

programme.title: Nocturnal Animals (2016)
programme.desc: A writer (Jake Gyllenhaal) asks his ex-wife (Amy Adams) to read a manuscript of his new novel, a troubling story about a family man whose life takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye (1996)
programme.desc: A slain girls mother (Sally Field) considers vigilantism after police and the courts botch the case against the killer (Kiefer Sutherland).

programme.title: The Silent Planet (2024)
programme.desc: Serving a life sentence alone on a distant planet, an aging convict must confront his past when a new prisoner arrives and forces him to remember his life on Earth.

programme.title: Funny Face (1957)
programme.desc: A fashion photographer (Fred Astaire) turns a Greenwich Village bookworm (Audrey Hepburn) into a Paris cover girl.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.sub-title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.desc: Benjamin Button (Brad Pitt) is born an old man in 1918 New Orleans and ages in reverse and, in so doing, becomes intimately familiar with the natures of love and death.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road (2008)
programme.desc: In 1950s Connecticut, two suburbanites (Leonardo DiCaprio, Kate Winslet) become increasingly dissatisfied with their marriage and societys expectations of conformity.

programme.title: The Queen (2006)
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth II and Prime Minister Tony Blair try to reach a compromise in determining the royal familys public reaction to Princess Dianas death.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley (1999)
programme.desc: A young man (Matt Damon) travels to 1950s Italy and begins to assume the identity of a playboy (Jude Law) he was hired to bring back to the United States.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: Assassination Nation (2018)
programme.desc: A small town gets turned upside down when an anonymous hacker reveals personal messages and secrets of thousands of people. As anger erupts into full-blown violence, four teenage girls find themselves in a fight for their lives against an armed mob.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road (2008)
programme.desc: In 1950s Connecticut, two suburbanites (Leonardo DiCaprio, Kate Winslet) become increasingly dissatisfied with their marriage and societys expectations of conformity.

programme.title: A Mighty Heart (2007)
programme.desc: Mariane Pearl (Angelina Jolie) begins a terrifying search for her husband, journalist Daniel Pearl (Dan Futterman), after he is kidnapped by terrorists in 2002 Pakistan.

programme.title: Nobodys Fool (2018)
programme.desc: Wild child Tanya looks to her buttoned-up, by-the-book sister Danica to help her get back on her feet. As these polar opposites collide, Tanya soon discovers that Danicas picture-perfect life and boyfriend may not be what they seem.

programme.title: A Single Man (2009)
programme.desc: Planning to commit suicide at the end of the day, a gay professor (Colin Firth) who recently lost his lover goes about his daily routine and visits with longtime friends.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.sub-title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.desc: A 50s-era housewife (Julianne Moore) uses her wit and winnings from commercial jingle contests to help support her large family.

programme.title: Beautiful Girls (1996)
programme.desc: The opposite sex preoccupies working-class pals gathered for their high-school reunion in small-town Massachusetts.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance (2001)
programme.desc: A white teenager (Julia Stiles) moves to Chicago after her mothers death and falls for a black student (Sean Patrick Thomas) who shares her love of dance.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridgets (Renee Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.
